meaning: University of California at San Diego (美国) 加利福尼亚大学圣迭戈分校
examples: With the help of Quyen Nguyen, a surgeon based at UCSD, Dr. Tsien has tested the hairpin dye on mice that had had breast cancer-induced in their bodies.
The UCSD researchers said they will submit the study to a medical journal for publication.
ROCKS was created and maintained by UCSD and they have done a good job of making clusters user friendly.
Smarr was headed back to teaching when he got a call from UCSD about starting the new institute.
It was just my luck that UCSD offered an exchange program to Spelman.
